description: Engineering review checks for cloud-hosted services. Covers architecture, security, observability, reliability, deployment, testing, AI/RAI, and documentation.

checkpoints.title: ADRs exist for major architectural decisions
checkpoints.description: Architecture Decision Records document the why behind key design choices. Required before production launch.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create a docs/decisions/ or docs/adr/ directory with at least one ADR. Use a standard template: title, status, context, decision, consequences.

checkpoints.title: Token validation on protected endpoints
checkpoints.description: All protected endpoints must validate authentication tokens via a decorator, middleware, or dependency injection.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Apply auth middleware or a validation decorator to all protected route handlers.

checkpoints.title: Authorization not in audit/permissive mode
checkpoints.description: Authorization enforcement must not be in audit or permissive/learning mode in production.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Set authorization enforcement to enforced mode. Remove or disable any audit/permissive mode flags in production config.

checkpoints.title: Input validation for injection attacks
checkpoints.description: Application must validate and sanitize inputs to prevent injection attacks.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create a validators/ or schemas/ directory with input validation logic. Use a validation library appropriate for your stack.

checkpoints.title: Threat model document exists
checkpoints.description: A threat model must be documented before production launch for customer-facing services.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create a threat model document in docs/. Include trust boundaries, data flows, and mitigations for identified threats.

checkpoints.title: Responsible disclosure policy exists
checkpoints.description: SECURITY.md defines how to report security vulnerabilities.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a SECURITY.md with instructions for reporting vulnerabilities. Include contact method and expected response time.

checkpoints.title: SDL gates enabled in CI pipeline
checkpoints.description: Security Development Lifecycle gates (credential scanning, dependency scanning, SAST) must run in CI.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add credential scanning, dependency scanning, and SAST steps to your CI pipeline.

checkpoints.title: Auth validation tests exist
checkpoints.description: Tests specifically covering authentication and authorization logic must exist.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add test files covering auth flows: valid tokens, expired tokens, unauthorized access, permission boundaries.

checkpoints.title: No hardcoded secrets or credentials
checkpoints.description: Source code must not contain hardcoded passwords, API keys, tokens, or connection strings.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Move all secrets to environment variables or a secrets manager. Use os.environ, dotenv, or Key Vault references.

checkpoints.title: Application telemetry SDK wired
checkpoints.description: Service must emit telemetry via OpenTelemetry or an equivalent SDK.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Instrument your application with OpenTelemetry or your organization's telemetry SDK. Emit traces, metrics, and logs.

checkpoints.title: Alert rules defined
checkpoints.description: Automated alert rules must be defined for error rate, latency, and availability thresholds.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Define alert rules as code in your infra/ directory. Cover p99 latency, error rate >1%, and availability <99.9%.

checkpoints.title: Production dashboards defined as code
checkpoints.description: Monitoring dashboards must be defined as code (Bicep, Terraform, Grafana JSON, etc.).
checkpoints.fix_hint: Commit your dashboard definition as code so it can be version controlled and reproduced.

checkpoints.title: Health check endpoint exists
checkpoints.description: Service must expose a /health endpoint returning HTTP 200 with JSON status.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a GET /health endpoint that returns {"status": "healthy"} with HTTP 200 when operational.

checkpoints.title: Retry logic with backoff for external calls
checkpoints.description: All external service calls must implement retry with exponential backoff.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Wrap external HTTP calls with retry logic and exponential backoff. Use tenacity (Python), async-retry (Node), or equivalent.

checkpoints.title: Circuit breaker or timeout configured for external dependencies
checkpoints.description: External calls must have timeouts. Circuit breakers prevent cascading failures.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Set explicit timeouts on all HTTP clients. Consider adding a circuit breaker for critical dependencies.

checkpoints.title: CI/CD pipeline exists
checkpoints.description: Automated build, test, and deploy pipeline must be configured.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a CI/CD pipeline that runs tests and deploys on merge to main.

checkpoints.title: Infrastructure as code exists
checkpoints.description: Infrastructure must be defined as code — not provisioned manually.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Define your infrastructure in Bicep, Terraform, Pulumi, or CDK. Commit to the repo and deploy via pipeline.

checkpoints.title: Unit tests exist with minimum coverage
checkpoints.description: At least 10 unit test files must exist.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add unit tests. Aim for at least 10 test files covering core business logic.

checkpoints.title: Integration tests exist
checkpoints.description: Integration tests covering service boundaries and external dependencies must exist.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add an integration test suite that tests your service against real or stubbed dependencies.

checkpoints.title: Load/performance tests exist
checkpoints.description: Load tests must be defined to validate service performance under expected traffic.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add load tests using Locust, k6, or JMeter. Test at 2x expected peak traffic.

checkpoints.title: Coverage gate configured in CI
checkpoints.description: CI pipeline must enforce a minimum code coverage threshold.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Set a minimum coverage threshold. For pytest: add --cov-fail-under=80 to your test command.

checkpoints.title: Prompt injection detection implemented
checkpoints.description: AI/LLM features must include input validation to detect and block prompt injection attacks.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add prompt injection detection before passing user input to an LLM. Consider LLM Guard or a custom content filter.

checkpoints.title: Red team assessment documented
checkpoints.description: AI features must have a documented red team or adversarial testing assessment.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Document your red team assessment in docs/. Include attack scenarios tested and mitigations applied.

checkpoints.title: README exists
checkpoints.description: Every repository must have a README documenting purpose, setup, and usage.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Create a README.md covering: what this service does, how to set it up locally, how to run tests, and how to deploy.

checkpoints.title: CODEOWNERS configured
checkpoints.description: CODEOWNERS defines who reviews changes to which parts of the codebase.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a CODEOWNERS file mapping directories to team owners. Required for PR auto-assignment.

checkpoints.title: CHANGELOG exists
checkpoints.description: A CHANGELOG documents notable changes per release.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a CHANGELOG.md following Keep a Changelog format: https://keepachangelog.com

checkpoints.title: OpenAPI / API spec exists
checkpoints.description: REST APIs must have a machine-readable API specification.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Generate or write an OpenAPI 3.x spec. FastAPI and NestJS auto-generate this; for others use swagger-jsdoc or similar.
